Careers
Accommodations

Accommodations for persons with disabilities are available during the recruitment process, upon request. Should you require an accommodation or to obtain additional information on Gilmore Printing Services’ accommodation policies, please contact us using any of the following methods:

 By Email:
accessibility@gilmore.ca

 By Phone:
Telephone: 613-271-3306
Toll free: 1- 800-795-6661

Current Openings:

Printing Planner and Estimator

Gilmore Printing Services, located in Kanata, is a full-service commercial printer that has been providing both digital and offset print services since 1991. Our commitment to our customers has always been to strive each and every day to deliver quality, without compromise. Gilmore Printing Services is proud to have been certified by Idealliance as a G7 Master Printer.

This is a recognition of our daily commitment to providing accurate color and quality products to our customers. This commitment has helped Gilmore to grow into one of the largest, full service commercial printers in the region.

We have an excellent opportunity for someone who is looking to work with an industry leader as a planner/estimator.

Skill Requirements of Position:

Knowledge of printing processes and industries
Knowledge of print finishing and bindery processes
Knowledge of stock specifications and characteristics
Well organized and attention to detail
Strong communication skills
